_readme: Minimal setup: point 'sources' at your access log and start the server. Keys starting with _ are comments and are ignored. Full reference: docs/CONFIGURATION.md
_comment_runtime: watch / keywords / sources / geo.enabled are only read on the FIRST launch; afterwards edit them from the Settings tab in the web UI.

sources._comment: The most common case: live-tail one Nginx access log.
sources.name: nginx-main

sources._comment: Optional: watch a whole directory instead. Plain files are live-tailed; with read_compressed true, rotated *.gz archives are imported once. Delete this block if you don't need it.
sources.name: nginx-dir

_comment_auth: Without any account, anyone reaching the page is admin (fine on localhost). bootstrap_admin seeds the first login account; require_account true forces login from the very first start (a random admin password is printed to the server log if none is set). Set cookie_secure true when behind HTTPS.
_comment_geo: Powers the world map: source IPs are resolved to a country in the background via the free ip-api.com (no key needed). Set enabled false to disable all external lookups.
_comment_roots: Sources added later from the Settings UI may only point inside these directories.
